title: Fabrication and Characterization of Polymer-Based Nanofiber Nanocomposites for Electromagnetic Interference (EMI) Shielding Applications
authors: A. Author, B. Author, M. Esmeroğlu
abstract: This study investigates polymer-based nanofiber nanocomposites for electromagnetic interference shielding applications and evaluates structural and shielding performance under different processing conditions.

title: Magnetic Nanoparticle Reinforced PAN Nanofibers: Processing–Structure Relationship
authors: C. Researcher, M. Esmeroğlu, D. Researcher
abstract: A comparative study on reinforced PAN nanofibers focusing on process parameters, fiber morphology, and the resulting magnetic/functional behavior.
